trust.strip.years_body: Thiet ke tuyen Dong Nam A cho du khach phuong Tay.
trust.strip.support_body: Ho tro tai dia phuong trong suot hanh trinh.
trust.strip.fit_body: Lap ke hoach uu tien su thoai mai va minh bach ve lua chon.
how.heading: Quy trinh lap ke hoach cung AsiaTravelPlan
how.card1.title: 1. Goi tu van mien phi
how.card1.body: Chung toi thong nhat ve diem den, nhip do di chuyen, muc do thoai mai va ngan sach.
how.card2.title: 2. Phuong an lo trinh trong 48-72h
how.card2.body: Ban nhan duoc hai goi y thuc te voi noi dung bao gom ro rang.
how.card3.title: 3. Tinh chinh va xac nhan
how.card3.body: Chung toi dieu chinh khach san, hoat dong va di chuyen cho den khi phu hop.
how.card4.title: 4. Di du lich co ho tro
how.card4.body: Doi ngu tai dia phuong ho tro truoc va trong chuyen di, ke ca khi can doi lo trinh.
why.heading: Vi sao du khach chon AsiaTravelPlan
why.item1: Tuy chinh co cau truc: khach san, van chuyen, huong dan va nhip do duoc dieu chinh ro rang.
why.item2: Gia minh bach: nhung yeu to anh huong den bao gia duoc giai thich truoc khi thanh toan.
why.item3: Van hanh tai cho: ho tro doi lo trinh thuc te neu thoi tiet hoac van hanh thay doi.
why.item4: Lo trinh uu tien su thoai mai cho du khach de cao chat luong hon la gia re gay met moi.
why.caption: Chuyen gia tai dia phuong tai Viet Nam, Thai Lan, Campuchia va Lao.
trust.heading: Ve chung toi
trust.body: Chung toi ket hop van hanh tai dia phuong voi tieu chuan lap ke hoach ro rang.
trust.metric1.label: hai long tu de xuat den dat tour
trust.metric2.label: thoi gian gui de xuat lo trinh dau tien
trust.metric3.label: pham vi ho tro boi mot doi duy nhat
trust.review1.quote: "Moi lan di chuyen va nhan phong deu rat muot. Chung toi luon cam thay duoc cham soc."
trust.review1.author: Anna & James, Anh
trust.review2.quote: "Bao gia la ro rang nhat trong tat ca cac cong ty chung toi hoi. Khong co bat ngo phat sinh sau do."
trust.review2.author: Claire, Uc
trust.review3.quote: "Khi thoi tiet thay doi o mien Trung Viet Nam, ho da dieu chinh lich trinh rat nhanh va binh tinh."
trust.review3.author: Ben, Canada
faq.heading: Cau hoi thuong gap
faq.q1: 500 USD moi tuan co du cho mot chuyen di thoai mai khong?
faq.a1: Thong thuong la co cho mot ke hoach thoai mai hop ly, tuy thuoc mua, do phuc tap cua lo trinh va hang khach san.
faq.q2: Di rieng hay di doan: cai nao tot hon?
faq.a2: Di rieng phu hop hon cho su linh hoat va thoai mai. Tour doan co the giam chi phi nhung it quyen chu dong hon.
faq.q3: Bao lau thi nhan duoc de xuat lo trinh?
faq.a3: Tieu chuan cua chung toi la 48 den 72 gio sau cuoc goi tu van.
faq.q4: Co the ket hop ca bon quoc gia trong mot lo trinh khong?
faq.a4: Co. Chung toi co the thiet ke lo trinh da quoc gia voi toc do hop ly va chuyen chang ro rang.
faq.q5: Neu thoi tiet anh huong den ke hoach thi sao?
faq.a5: Chung toi dua ra phuong an thay the thuc te va ho tro doi lo trinh bang mang luoi doi tac tai dia phuong.
faq.q6: Ban co ho tro thong tin visa va nhap canh khong?
faq.a6: Co. Chung toi cung cap huong dan cap nhat ve yeu cau nhap canh va danh sach chuan bi thuc te.
contact.heading: Dat lich goi tu van mien phi
contact.body: Cho chung toi biet y tuong diem den va ngan sach cua ban. Chung toi se phan hoi voi cac lua chon ro rang va buoc tiep theo.
contact.item1: Chuyen gia tai dia phuong khap Viet Nam, Thai Lan, Campuchia va Lao.
contact.item2: Noi dung bao gom va khong bao gom ro rang truoc khi dat.
contact.item3: Gui de xuat dau tien nhanh trong 48 den 72 gio.
contact.item4: Ho tro trong chuyen di neu can thay doi ke hoach.
contact.response_time: Phan hoi trong 24 gio qua email hoac WhatsApp.
contact.review1.quote: "Chung toi nhan duoc lo trinh thiet ke rieng rat nhanh, va bao gia rat de hieu."
contact.review1.author: Emily, My
contact.review2.quote: "Ho tro tai dia phuong rat tot va nhip do lich trinh phu hop cho gia dinh chung toi."
contact.review2.author: Oliver, Anh
contact.review3.quote: "Ho da giup chung toi ket hop Viet Nam va Lao ma khong bi met o ngay di chuyen."
contact.review3.author: Sophie, Phap
contact.caption: Ho tro lo trinh thuc su tu truoc ngay khoi hanh den chuyen bay ve.
